aideCardDesc: Call our voice assistant, just like a real phone call — it answers all your questions about TrouveTout224.
permissionExplainMessage: To talk with the assistant out loud, your browser will ask for permission to use your microphone. Nothing is recorded or shared — it's only used during the call.
micDeniedMessage: You declined (or your browser blocked) microphone access. Allow the microphone in your browser settings to use voice calls, or continue by text.
unsupportedTitle: Voice call not available on this browser
unsupportedMessage: Your browser doesn't support speech recognition (common on iPhone Safari). No worries, you can continue with the text assistant.
lowTimeWarning: You have about 1 minute of call time left today.
quotaExceededTitle: Call time used up for today
quotaExceededMessage: You've used all your voice call time for today. Your quota resets at midnight (Conakry time).
talkOnWhatsapp: Talk to a human on WhatsApp
mansaUpsellDesc: The Mansa Pack gives access to more voice call time, plus other perks.
errorGenericMessage: Sorry, the assistant is having a technical issue. Contact WhatsApp support if needed.
